creator: oliver@akephalos.de
text:
emulators/vice is almost unusable with Athena widgets (xawd3d), if you open the menus they are all in black. So you cannot see a single line. Furthermore it's impossible to use Vice (performance-wise) since several updates of Xorg. The problems are gone if I'm using Gnome as default. Of course there are more dependencies, but at least it's usable again.

Fix: 

VICE_WITH_GNOME as default.
How-To-Repeat: Just compile the default with Athena widgets, open a menu and move the mouse pointer.
